description.value: Slot none; Price 22,301 gp; Aura strong abjuration and conjuration; CL 11th; Weight 1 lb DESCRIPTION A sadist’s lash is a long whip of thin strips of leather. The lash acts as a +1 wounding whip, and also aids enchantment spells in two ways. First, it can deliver enchantment spells with a range of touch as if the wielder had touched the creature struck. Additionally, any creature that takes damage from a sadist’s lash takes a â5 penalty on Will saves against all enchantment effects created by the wielder of the lash for 1 minute unless it succeeds at a DC 15 Will save. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells dominate person; Cost 11,301 gp
